productDisplayName: Esprit Women Rough Chic Black Silver Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Rough Chic analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 22 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Polished stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap intertwined with a stainless steel strap and a tang clasp with branding Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Black dial with zircon crystal indices marking 3, 6, 9 and 12 o& rsquo clock positions and polished hands Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
